pr.title: Record: Sliding Window + FP16 Embed + 10L + Muon WD + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.1748)

output.summary: Uses sliding-window scoring with FP16 tied embeddings, Muon weight decay, 10 layers, and spectral+sigmoid resid-mix init for stronger generalization.
techniques: FP16 tied embeddings prevent compounding quantization errors
Muon WD plus extra layer lets Muon compress more effectively
Overtone spectral init and sigmoid resid_mix scheduling prime the representation
